seo.title: VPS Hosting (Hetzner, etc.) implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping VPS Hosting (Hetzner, etc.) projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist outlines the essential steps for moving a production application from a managed environment to a self-managed VPS on providers like Hetzner, OVH, or Contabo. It focuses on security, reliability, and automation to ensure high availability without the overhead of managed platforms.

items.title: Disable Root SSH Login
items.description: Modify /etc/ssh/sshd_config to set PermitRootLogin no and verify you can login as a sudo user.

items.title: Enforce SSH Key Authentication
items.description: Set PasswordAuthentication no in SSH config to prevent brute-force password attacks.

items.title: Configure UFW/NFTables
items.description: Set a default deny policy and explicitly allow only ports 22, 80, and 443.

items.title: Install Fail2Ban
items.description: Configure jails for SSH and your web server to automatically ban IP addresses with multiple failed login attempts.

items.title: Enable Unattended Upgrades
items.description: Install the unattended-upgrades package and configure it to automatically install security patches daily.

items.title: Automated SSL Renewal
items.description: Configure Caddy or Nginx with Certbot to ensure Let's Encrypt certificates renew before the 90-day expiration.

items.title: HSTS Header Implementation
items.description: Add the Strict-Transport-Security header to proxy responses to force HTTPS-only connections.

items.title: IPv6 Connectivity
items.description: Verify the VPS has a valid AAAA record and the reverse proxy is listening on [::] to support European mobile networks.

items.title: Request Rate Limiting
items.description: Define limit_req zones in Nginx or use Caddy's rate_limit directive to prevent application-layer DoS.

items.title: Proxy Health Checks
items.description: Configure the reverse proxy to check the backend service status before routing traffic to prevent 502 errors.

items.title: Docker Log Rotation
items.description: Set max-size and max-file in /etc/docker/daemon.json to prevent container logs from filling the system disk.

items.title: Non-Root Container Users
items.description: Verify Dockerfiles include a USER directive so the application process does not run with root privileges inside the container.

items.title: Resource Constraints
items.description: Apply memory and CPU limits in docker-compose.yml to prevent a single container from crashing the entire VPS.

items.title: Automated Image Pruning
items.description: Schedule a weekly cron job for 'docker system prune -f' to remove unused images and build cache.

items.title: Kamal/Coolify Deployment Hooks
items.description: Configure post-deployment health checks to verify the new container is responding before shutting down the old one.

items.title: Provider-Level Snapshots
items.description: Enable daily automated snapshots in the Hetzner or OVH control panel for full-server recovery.

items.title: Off-site Database Backups
items.description: Configure a cron job to stream encrypted database dumps to S3-compatible storage outside the VPS provider's network.

items.title: Backup Restoration Test
items.description: Manually restore a database backup to a local development environment to verify data integrity.

items.title: Volume Mounting for Persistence
items.description: Ensure all database data and user uploads are stored on attached block storage volumes, not the local OS disk.

items.title: Environment Variable Backup
items.description: Store an encrypted copy of the .env file or secrets in a secure password manager or vault.

items.title: External Uptime Monitoring
items.description: Set up an external service to ping the application's health endpoint every 60 seconds.

items.title: Disk Space Alerts
items.description: Configure a monitoring agent (e.g., Netdata or Prometheus) to alert when disk usage exceeds 80%.

items.title: Configure Swap Space
items.description: Create a swap file (2-4GB) to provide a buffer for memory spikes on low-RAM VPS instances.

items.title: NTP Time Synchronization
items.description: Ensure systemd-timesyncd is active to prevent clock drift, which can cause issues with SSL and auth tokens.

items.title: Centralized Log Aggregation
items.description: Forward system and application logs to a dedicated logging server or service for post-mortem analysis.
